name: Inzektor Crossbow - Zektarrow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲虫装機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>インゼクター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ゼクトアロー
desc: Equip only to an "Inzektor" monster. It gains 500 ATK. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of the equipped monster's effects.
eff: Equip only to an "Inzektor" monster. It gains 500 ATK. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of the equipped monster's effects.

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
misc: Equips only to a specific target
